@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KWQC1N0Q97RKK7J162RTCRHC
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8580'
+title: Delete Librarian and FoundAPIs; migrate TranscriptAnalyzer to Selection
+---
+## What
+Eliminate the code the registry now owns.
+
+- Delete `Sources/FoundationModelsMultitool/Agent/Librarian.swift` — superseded by the registry's `SelectionTier`/`MetadataSearcher` (prefix caching, fork-per-call, capacity fallback, selection guidance — the registry's `SelectionConfig.preamble` even defaults to `Librarian.selectionGuidance` verbatim as `.librarianDefault`).
+- Delete `Sources/FoundationModelsMultitool/Agent/FoundAPIs.swift` — the `@Generable FoundAPI`/`FoundAPIs` guided-output shape is superseded by the registry's public ids-only `Selection` (its doc says so explicitly): the model picks ids; blocks come back verbatim from the catalog.
+- Migrate `Sources/FoundationModelsMultitool/Agent/TranscriptAnalyzer.swift`: `foundAPIs(in:slot:)` currently decodes `FoundAPIs(GeneratedContent(json:))` from flash-slot `.response` events. Replace with a method decoding the registry's `Selection` (e.g. `selections(in:slot:) -> [Selection]`), since flash responses now carry `{"ids": [...]}`.
+- Update `Tests/FoundationModelsMultitoolTests/TranscriptAssertionTests.swift` and its checked-in fixture JSONL transcripts under `Tests/.../Goldens` so flash-slot responses are Selection-shaped.
+- Delete `Tests/FoundationModelsMultitoolTests/LibrarianTests.swift`, `Tests/FoundationModelsMultitoolTests/Fixtures/LibrarianFixtures.swift` (move any still-needed fakes — e.g. `RecordingSessionFactory` if the rewired FindAPITool tests use it — into `MultiToolAgentFixtures.swift`), and `Goldens/LibrarianPrefix.txt`. The behaviors they pinned (prefix assembly, fork-per-call, root caching, capacity fallback, grammar derivation) are owned and tested by the registry.
+- Clean the stale doc-comment mention of `FoundAPI.init` in `Sources/FoundationModelsMultitool/Agent/AgentTurn.swift`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `grep -rn "Librarian\|FoundAPI" Sources/` returns no type references (prose doc-comments describing the librarian *role* may remain only if they point at the registry).
+- [ ] `TranscriptAnalyzer` decodes Selection-shaped flash output; no `FoundAPIs` decoding remains.
+- [ ] `swift build` and full `swift test` green.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Updated `TranscriptAssertionTests` decode Selection ids from the updated fixture JSONL transcripts.
+- [ ] `swift test` — full suite green after the deletions.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — update the failing transcript-assertion tests first, then migrate the analyzer.
\ No newline at end of file
